subject.title: Add native support for AWS FIPS endpoints in Bedrock
subject.body:
### Description

Many AWS services offer FIPS endpoint variations (https://aws.amazon.com/compliance/fips/).
Use of these variations is a requirement for building products in highly secure environments, particularly in the context of US/Canada's federal contractors. 

AWS services support this by allowing a standardized env var (AWS_USE_FIPS_ENDPOINT) in most of their libraries. While it's possible to use these endpoints in bedrock in the current ai-sdk using the baseURL override in the options, it would be preferable to offer a cloud-native and AWS-compatible route for this, too.

Feature request:
- ai-sdk to use FIPS endpoint for Bedrock if AWS_USE_FIPS_ENDPOINT is true
- ai-sdk to use FIPS endpoint for Bedrock if option is explicitly passed in

### AI SDK Version

_No response_

### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
